items.title: Schedule catch-up call with Barak Perelman this weekend
items.context: Email from Richie on May 8: 'I wanted to reach out to see if you're free to catch up on Sunday or Monday? It would be great to touch base on process and share more about how we're thinking about partnership.'

items.title: Get Logan's feedback on Octane founder profile and cap table
items.context: Email from Derek on May 8 (IC-Extended draft): 'I want to get a feel for Logan's comfort with founder profile and cap table before doing too much.'

items.title: Complete competitor assessment for Octane
items.context: Email from Stephanie on May 6: 'I've not assessed their competitors in much detail to assess how thorough their comp analysis is.'

items.title: Follow up with Prism Layer for seed deck next week
items.context: Email from simone@prismlayer.ai on May 8: 'You'll be first on the list for our seed deck, which we'll have finished next week.'

items.title: Review updated slides from VanishID
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on May 5 sharing updated slides with Derek, cc'd Fan and Logan.

items.title: Follow up with Roy on round status after his travel (~May 20)
items.context: Email from roy@orchid.security on May 6: 'We passed on a TS this week... Travel over the next two weeks will slow things down a bit, but we're making good progress.'

items.title: Prep for U.S. Bank Quarterly Leadership Call on May 11
items.context: Calendar event 'Fin Capital & U.S. Bank | Quarterly Leadership Call' on May 11 with 26 attendees from U.S. Bank and Fin Capital leadership.

items.title: Prep for GetReal Labs Investor Briefing on May 11
items.context: Calendar event 'GetReal & FinCapital | Investor Briefing' on May 11 with GetReal Labs team (Matt Moynahan, Varun Kohli, Jim, Hany).
